title: dev.calls.list
description: Read the in-memory recent-calls ring buffer captured by the developer-mode recording proxy. Session-only, never persisted.

limit.description: Optional max rows to return. Defaults to the full buffer (100). Larger values are clamped.

id.description: Monotonic session-scoped id. Used as the row key.

contract.description: Operation name at call time, e.g. plan.create.

contract_version.description: Operation version at call time. Pinned per call.

request.description: Redacted request payload. Sensitive fields are replaced with the string '<redacted>'.

response.description: Response payload on success. Absent when the call errored.

error.description: Error envelope on failure. Absent on success.

duration_ms.description: Monotonic elapsed time from dispatch to response or error.

payload_truncated.description: True when the recorder truncated the stored request or response above the 64 KB threshold.

errors.message: Developer mode is disabled. The recording proxy is not installed; no calls are available.
